title: atelophragma omboides
intro: Atelophragma omboides, also known as the Ombroid Fern, is a species of fern found in tropical regions, specifically in the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The Ombroid Fern is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it can also be dried and processed into powder or capsules for easier consumption.
